ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_financial_data" (
  "codmes" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the month (format: YYYYMM) */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "default" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the customer has defaulted (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "deuda_rcc" REAL /* Outstanding debt in the customer's credit card account */,
  "atraso_12m" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been delinquent in the past 12 months */,
  "clasisfsbs" INTEGER /* SBS classification of the customer's financial health (0 = Low Risk, 1 = High Risk) */,
  "varpasivo_6_12" REAL /* Percentage change in the customer's passive accounts (savings, investments) over the last 6 months */,
  "flujo_transaccional" REAL /* Transactional cash flow for the customer in the given month */,
  "income" REAL /* Monthly income of the customer */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total monthly expenses of the customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, self-employed) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "property_ownership" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the customer owns property (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "vehicle_ownership" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the customer owns a vehicle (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "investment_assets" REAL /* Value of investment assets */,
  "savings_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of savings to income */,
  "default_reason" TEXT /* Reason for default (if applicable) */,
  "financial_counseling_needed" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the customer needs financial counseling (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("codmes", "id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the institution */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the customer */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the customer started their current employment */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Current job title of the customer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "credit_history_length" INTEGER /* Length of the customer's credit history in months */,
  "financial_advisor_assigned" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned financial advisor (if applicable) */,
  "communication_preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, payment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., groceries, utilities, entertainment) */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant (if applicable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the transaction (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the transaction is recurring (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the credit account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who holds the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the credit account (e.g., credit card, personal loan) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the credit account */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the account */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made on the account */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the credit account */,
  "minimum_payment_due" REAL /* Minimum payment due on the account */,
  "past_due_amount" REAL /* Amount past due on the account */,
  "next_due_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment due */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, delinquent, closed) */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* JSON array of payment history */,
  "credit_utilization_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the current balance to the credit limit */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("id")
)
